note: Formal Lighthouse / Core Web Vitals baseline deferred — /benchmark skill not installed, and the feature's observable perf (iframe load time) is dominated by Canva CDN, not Aura-board. A qualitative baseline is captured here for comparison after deploy.

notes: resolveCanvaEmbedUrl is server-only (Node runtime) — not in client bundle

expected_runtime_costs.post_cards_p50_extra_ms: 150-400 (oEmbed fetch to Canva CDN from icn1 region)
expected_runtime_costs.render_extra_ms: negligible (iframe is async, thumbnail is already on the path)

followups_for_real_perf_pass: Run Lighthouse on /board/:id with a seeded Canva card after deploy to icn1 production.
Measure LCP with and without thumbnail-first swap to confirm the v1 selection vs v2 tradeoff from phase5.
Measure oEmbed p50/p99 in prod logs once live to set a SLO.
